prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of IBM stock, which typically exhibits moderate daily price movements of 1-2%. Using a 7-day forecast horizon with annualized volatility around 25-30%, the prediction assumes slight upward bias due to general market trends while accounting for increased uncertainty over the weekly timeframe. Confidence intervals widen appropriately to reflect higher uncertainty at greater confidence levels.
